free_text: Angular-momentum effect in the fusion reaction of
Department of Chemistry and Laboratory of
Department of Chemistry, Faculty of Science
- Physical-form of target is solid. (Metal foils)
- Backing is aluminium. Target was sandwiched by Al
catcher foils. In some runs, Al foils were replaced
by graphite foils with nearly the same stopping
products and 2 hour for long-lived products
Energy degration of 40Ar ions in target stack
was calculated using the OSCAR code [K. Hata
Assignments of gamma-ray peaks were made
according to their energies and half-lives.
resolution of around 2 keV at 1.33 MeV
Mainly due to statistical errors in counting
gamma-ray emission and expected errors in the
Distribution of cummulative yields of the
Energies and half-lives for assignments of gamma-ray
